simple_types.name: Exception_Type
simple_types.code:
type Exception_Type is
  (No_Exception,
   VME_Constraint_Error,
   VME_Data_Error,
   VME_End_Error,
   VME_Index_Error,
   VME_Mode_Error,
   VME_Name_Error,
   VME_Program_Error,
   …,
   VME_Custom
  );

Post_Mortem_Data

subtypes.name: Ada_Error_Exception_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Ada_Error_Exception_Type is Exception_Type range VME_Constraint_Error .. VME_Use_Error;

packages.name: Console_Traits

documentation.description:
Due to the large amount of abstracted subprograms, we wrap
some groups into "traits". The idea is explained here:
https://blog.adacore.com/traits-based-containers
